rationale.fidelity: Correctly separates the executable pre-08:00 incumbent from the post-deadline certificate and preserves the routing objective and constraints.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the release decision and operational timing concrete, though the actor and counterfactual are somewhat implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Avoids an unsupported contribution claim and bounds the research distinction, but supplies no traceable literature position.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly labels routine pre-deadline certification as unsupported and requests runtime evidence.
rationale.prose_clarity: Concise, precise, and easy to follow.
rationale.overall: A faithful diagnosis of the deadline error with strong evidence boundaries and no hard failure.
